title: CStrifiky
description: PvP resource pack that changes Minecraft weapons like swords, bow, crossbow, etc. to CS:GO weapons
body:
««–CStrifiky–»» is a Minecraft PvP resource pack that takes inspiration from CS:GO and transfers its weapons to the game


No OptiFine needed

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

🔥 Features: 

-   changed Crosshair 
-   changed Wooden sword to Skeleton Knife | Case Hardened
-   changed Stone sword to Butterfly Knife | Slaughter
-   changed Iron sword to M9 Bayonet | Gamma Doppler Phase 4
-   changed Golden sword to Gut Knife | Lore
-   changed Diamond sword to Karambit | Fade
-   changed Netherite sword to Ursus Knife | Doppler Phase 1
-   changed Bow to AK-47 | Asiimov : Stickers : NiKo | Cluj-Napoca 2015
-   changed Crossbow to AWP | Dragon Lore : Stickers : Reason Gaming (Holo) | Katowice 2014 : Howling Dawn : Titan (Holo) | Katowice 2014 : FaZe Clan (Holo) | Katowice 2019
-   changed Splash potions to flashbang
-   changed Lingering potions to molotov
 
-   changed Attack sounds
-   changed Bow sounds
-   changed Crossbow and quick charge enchantments sounds
-   changed Pickup sound
-   changed Splash potion sound
 
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

🚫 Troubleshooting:

-   can be sound issues at multiversion servers like Hypixel
